input.user_input: Add a force majeure clause to this supply agreement. Use the ISDA standard definition as a starting point.

actual:
I would be happy to add an ISDA-style force majeure clause to your supply agreement. However, it looks like you haven't uploaded the document yet. 

Please upload the supply agreement, and I will insert the clause for you. 

For your reference, an ISDA-style force majeure clause typically focuses on a party being prevented from performing (or it becoming impossible or impracticable to perform) due to a force majeure or act of state, provided the event is beyond the control of the affected party and could not be overcome by the exercise of reasonable diligence. Once you upload the document, I can tailor this standard to fit seamlessly into your agreement's existing structure and definitions.
